<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type extension = string
  type file = string
  type filename = string
  type charset = string
  val no_charset : Charset_mime.charset
  type charset_assoc
  val empty_charset_assoc :
    ?default:Charset_mime.charset -> unit -> Charset_mime.charset_assoc
  val empty_mime_assoc :
    ?default:Charset_mime.charset -> unit -> Charset_mime.charset_assoc
  val find_charset :
    string -> Charset_mime.charset_assoc -> Charset_mime.charset
  val default_charset : Charset_mime.charset_assoc -> Charset_mime.charset
  val set_default_charset :
    Charset_mime.charset_assoc ->
    Charset_mime.charset -> Charset_mime.charset_assoc
  val update_charset_ext :
    Charset_mime.charset_assoc ->
    Charset_mime.extension ->
    Charset_mime.charset -> Charset_mime.charset_assoc
  val update_charset_file :
    Charset_mime.charset_assoc ->
    Charset_mime.filename ->
    Charset_mime.charset -> Charset_mime.charset_assoc
  val update_charset_regexp :
    Charset_mime.charset_assoc ->
    Re.Pcre.regexp -> Charset_mime.charset -> Charset_mime.charset_assoc
  type mime_type = string
  val default_mime_type : Charset_mime.mime_type
  type mime_assoc
  val default_mime_assoc : unit -> Charset_mime.mime_assoc
  val parse_mime_types : filename:string -> Charset_mime.mime_assoc
  val find_mime : Charset_mime.file -> Charset_mime.mime_assoc -> string
  val default_mime : Charset_mime.mime_assoc -> Charset_mime.mime_type
  val set_default_mime :
    Charset_mime.mime_assoc ->
    Charset_mime.mime_type -> Charset_mime.mime_assoc
  val update_mime_ext :
    Charset_mime.mime_assoc ->
    Charset_mime.extension ->
    Charset_mime.mime_type -> Charset_mime.mime_assoc
  val update_mime_file :
    Charset_mime.mime_assoc ->
    Charset_mime.filename ->
    Charset_mime.mime_type -> Charset_mime.mime_assoc
  val update_mime_regexp :
    Charset_mime.mime_assoc ->
    Re.Pcre.regexp -> Charset_mime.mime_type -> Charset_mime.mime_assoc
end >>
